title: Temple Projects
description: Over two decades of supplying premium Jaisalmer sandstone for temple construction projects across India. From village mandirs to grand temple complexes, our stone has graced thousands of sacred spaces.

specifications.States Covered: Rajasthan, Gujarat, UP, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu

title: Heritage Architecture
description: Expert stone supply for heritage restoration projects including havelis, stepwells, colonial buildings, and historic temples. We match existing stone grades for seamless restoration.

title: Jali Design Gallery
description: Our portfolio of stone jali screens spans traditional Rajasthani geometric patterns to contemporary minimalist designs. Used in residential, commercial and temple projects worldwide.

title: Stone Cladding Projects
description: Stone cladding portfolio showcasing interior and exterior applications. From luxury villa facades to commercial building fronts and heritage hotel interiors.

title: Decorative Pillars
description: Portfolio of decorative stone pillars and columns. Classical fluted columns, ornate temple pillars, modern smooth columns — all hand-crafted or CNC-machined in Jaisalmer sandstone.

title: Custom Stone Carvings
tagline: Any form, any vision — carved in stone
description: Bespoke carved stone portfolio. Deity figures, decorative panels, architectural reliefs, garden sculptures and corporate art pieces crafted by master shilpis.
